label: Pingdom
description: Connect to Pingdom to access uptime and synthetic monitoring data, alerts, and check results.

form.title: Connect Pingdom
form.subtitle: Paste your Pingdom API token to give Anton access to your uptime and synthetic monitoring data.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste a Pingdom API token generated from Settings → Pingdom API. The simplest and most direct way to connect — no OAuth app setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Pingdom API Token

1. Log in to your Pingdom account at [my.pingdom.com](https://my.pingdom.com).
2. Click your account name in the top-right corner, then go to **Settings**.
3. Select **Pingdom API** from the left sidebar.
4. Click **Generate API Token**.
5. Give the token a descriptive name like `Anton`.
6. Choose the appropriate access level — **Read** is sufficient for pulling monitoring data; select **Read-Write** if you want Anton to manage checks.
7. Click **Create Token**. Copy the token immediately — it is only shown once.
8. Paste the token into the **API Token** field below.

## Notes

- Tokens are scoped to the Pingdom account that generated them. Multi-account setups require one connector per account.
- If you lose the token, delete it in Settings → Pingdom API and generate a new one.
- The Pingdom API base URL is `https://api.pingdom.com/api/3.1`. Tokens are passed via the `Authorization: Bearer` header.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Found in Pingdom → Settings → Pingdom API. Shown only once at creation — store it safely.

fields.name: account_email
fields.label: Account Email (multi-account only)
fields.description: Only required if your token has access to multiple Pingdom accounts and you want to target a specific one. Leave blank for single-account setups.
